title: Perplexity
html:
AI-native search engine — the most explicit Google-replacement in the LLM cluster Rankett tracks. Cited 23 times across the corpus, all in Rankett / Insight AI / aeo agency context. Functions in Yahir's product thinking as "the SEO-replacement target" — if your brand isn't surfacing in Perplexity answers, you're losing the queries that used to hit Google.

TL;DR

  • One of the seven LLMs Rankett tracks for share-of-voice (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, Grok, DeepSeek).
  • The first LLM Yahir actually proved Rankett's hypothesis on — the "Best Plumbers Perplexity" research note is the proof-of-concept that started the AEO Agency arc.
  • Featured in every Rankett pitch (2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide, 2026 01 11 rankett meetup prep revised, 2026 01 05 rankett infrastructure, 2026 04 27 Rankett.com, 2026 02 28 proven playbook).
  • Strategically distinct from Google AI Overviews — Perplexity has its own ranking signals (citation graph, source quality, freshness) that require different optimization tactics.
  • Adjacent to the AI search thesis formed across 2022–2026.

Key facts

  • The "Best Plumbers" proof-of-concept. 2025 09 23 bestplumbersperplexity a4a93a78 — Yahir queried Perplexity for local plumber rankings and saw the exact SEO-replacement opportunity that became the AEO Agency thesis.
  • Citation-graph ranking. Perplexity's mechanism is closer to academic citation ranking than Google PageRank — informs the schema markup / llm.txt prep.
  • Featured in pitches as the "Google killer" framing. 2026 01 07 rankett meetup prep guide / 2026 01 11 rankett meetup prep revised both lead with Perplexity as the most legible Google-replacement to non-technical agency owners.
  • Earliest Yahir-vault reference. 2025 09 23 bestplumbersperplexity a4a93a78 — same week as the AEO Agency pipeline kickoff.
  • GEO/AEO/AAS framing. 2025 12 30 GEO AI AAS Agency uses Perplexity as the canonical example.
